news.title: Trump cancels U.S. envoy trip to Pakistan for Iran war negotiations: 'If they want to talk, all they have to do is call'
news.description: U.S. special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner had been expected to arrive in Islamabad on Saturday.

news.title: AI talent war: Software industry is a new target as top executives jump ship to OpenAI
news.description: Software giants are seeing their worst stock performance in years on fears of AI disruption. Now they have a new problem.

news.title: Will he stay or will he go? With criminal probe over, Fed Chair Powell faces big decision
news.description: The decision could have important ramifications for policymaking at an especially delicate time.

news.title: U.S. imposes sanctions on Chinese 'teapot' refinery for buying Iranian oil
news.description: The Office of Foreign Assets Control said it imposed sanctions on about 40 shipping companies and vessels that operate as part of Iran's shadow fleet.

news.title: Wall Street is getting bullish on neoclouds. These stocks hold more risk than other AI plays
news.description: Neoclouds emerged as stopgaps to address the GPU shortage, but their economics are fragile, McKinsey has warned.

news.title: Morgan Stanley says these top stocks have more room to run ahead of earnings
news.description: Morgan Stanley named five stocks that have plenty of upside going into earnings.

news.title: Trump and journalists will be closely watched to see how they get along at White House correspondents' dinner
news.description: The Republican president did not attend the dinner during his first term or the first year of his second.

news.title: Berkshire attracts interest as it slips further behind the S&P 500
news.description: As Berkshire Hathaway shares fall, the stock is drawing attention from some investors.

news.title: China car giant BYD says it can thrive without US
news.description: With the price of fuel rising China's BYD says it is positioning itself to benefit from the global shift away from fossil fuels.

news.title: Stock markets are too high and set to fall, says Bank of England deputy
news.description: It is unusual for a senior figure at the Bank to be so forthright on market movements.

news.title: US justice department drops probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell
news.description: President Donald Trump had accused Powell of improper cost overruns in renovating the Fed's building.

news.title: How does it affect me if share prices fall?
news.description: Changes in the FTSE 100 and other indexes are not just for financial experts, they can affect our lives.

news.title: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
news.description: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.

news.title: From scientist to silk farmer: India's silk industry renewal
news.description: Silk production is an increasingly high-tech business in India.

news.title: Which airlines are cancelling flights to the UK - and what can you do?
news.description: Airlines are putting up prices and cancelling flights in response to higher jet fuel prices.

news.title: US soldier charged after winning $400,000 betting on removal of Maduro
news.description: Gannon Ken Van Dyke allegedly made trades on Polymarket on the basis of classified information, the justice department says.

news.title: From car and phone to tractor owners, a populist wave is rising to end the 'captive' repair economy
news.description: "Right to repair" legislation is an issue that political candidates across the U.S. have made part of their affordability messaging.

news.title: AI talent war: Software industry is a new target as top executives jump ship to OpenAI

news.title: We tried out xAI's Grok chatbot while driving a Tesla in NYC. Here's what happened.
news.description: CNBC takes a ride with a Tesla Model Y owner in New York City to see how he uses Grok and  how it integrates into Tesla's Full Self-Driving (Supervised).

news.title: Cramer's week ahead: Record highs meet a pivotal week for tech earnings
news.description: Jim Cramer said this market has become a "beast". His gameplan highlights a packed slate of tech earnings which will determine whether the surge can continue.

news.title: Nvidia stock closes at record, pushing market cap past $5 trillion
news.description: Nvidia's stock closed at its first record since October, as a rally in Intel pushed chipmakers higher.

news.title: How a new Amazon-backed Hollywood production startup deploys AI for speed and cost-cutting
news.description: A new AI-powered hybrid Hollywood startup backed by AWS is betting that cutting-edge production tech can cut costs, speed up filming and bring jobs back to LA.

news.title: Amazon custom chips get a boost from Meta, giving the cloud giant another path to win in AI
news.description: Amazon hits a record high after its new Meta deal highlights how AWS is gaining traction in AI through both cloud capacity and its custom chips.

chinaNews.title: 特朗普：绝不允许银行破坏加密货币市场法案
chinaNews.description: 据CoinDesk援引现场与会人士消息，特朗普在佛罗里达州海湖庄园的私人活动上表示，白宫不会任由银行阻挠、破坏数字资产市场监管立法。

chinaNews.title: 披露文件显示，特朗普3月份购买了至少5100万美元的债券
chinaNews.description: 据周六公布的财务披露文件显示，美国总统特朗普3月份购买了至少5100万美元的债券，涉及多个行业。 根据美国政府道德办公室发布的表格，特朗普上月进行了175笔金融交易。

chinaNews.description: 美国油价攀升、特朗普支持率下滑、伊朗战争久拖不决，在此背景下，共和党正重新制定11月中期选举的竞选纲领。 核心策略：借助特朗普的选民动员力...
